summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel UX + Consistency Enhancement refactor. All 15 admin tabs tested. All tabs load correctly with proper filters, tables, and action buttons. One critical bug found and fixed in LogsTab (SelectItem empty string value causing runtime crash). All dialogs open correctly. Orders fee badge displays correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem components with value='' caused uncaught runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' - page crashed when Logs tab opened
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Changed empty string values to '__all__' in Source, Entity Type, Success, and Severity SelectItem components in LogsTab.tsx

issues: Minor: Sidebar section groupings (People, Commerce, Content, Settings) look clean and well-structured. No issues found.

test_results.admin_panel_loads: PASS - Left sidebar navigation with all tabs visible
test_results.users_tab: PASS - Admin users table, Create Admin User button, role/status badges (super_admin only)
test_results.customers_tab: PASS - 28 customers, search/country/status/bank/card/partner-map filters, Export CSV, Create Customer, pagination
test_results.orders_tab: PASS - 70 records, email/order#/status/product/date filters, Export CSV, Create Manual Order, pagination (1-20 of 70)
test_results.orders_fee_badge: PASS - Fee badges display correctly as amber 'fee: $X.XX' badge in Fee column
test_results.subscriptions_tab: PASS - All filters (email, status, payment, 6 date range inputs), Export CSV, Create Manual Subscription
test_results.promo_codes_tab: PASS - Code/status filters, Create Promo Code dialog with all form fields
test_results.terms_tab: PASS - Status filter, Create Terms dialog with title/content inputs
test_results.articles_tab: PASS - Self-contained (no customers prop needed), category filter, Create Article dialog with rich editor
test_results.quote_requests_tab: PASS - Table and Create Quote Request button
test_results.bank_transactions_tab: PASS - Table, source/status/type filters, Export CSV, Add Transaction button
test_results.categories_tab: PASS - Categories table with edit/toggle/delete actions, Create Category button
test_results.catalog_tab: PASS - Product list with category/billing/pricing/price/status columns, Export CSV, New Product
test_results.override_codes_tab: PASS - Override codes table with status filters
test_results.settings_tab: PASS - Store information, logo upload, brand colors, system configuration
test_results.logs_tab: PASS (after fix) - Loads with 15 records, all filter dropdowns working (Source, Entity Type, Success, Severity)

action_items: No remaining action items - LogsTab SelectItem bug was fixed inline
critical_code_review_comments: LogsTab.tsx: Used <SelectItem value=''> for 'All' options in Source, Entity Type, Success, Severity dropdowns. Radix UI SelectItem does not allow empty string values (reserved for placeholder). Fixed by using '__all__' as the value and mapping back to '' in onValueChange.

Minor: Hydration warnings in console about '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - these are from the Emergent live editor overlay wrapping options in spans. Not a real app bug, only occurs in preview environment.
Subscriptions pagination: correctly hidden when total <= 20 records (AdminPagination component handles this correctly with 'if (total <= perPage && totalPages <= 1) return null')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel refactor fully tested. All 15 tabs in left sidebar navigation tested and working. Key fix: LogsTab.tsx SelectItem empty string value bug was fixed (lines 143-183 area). The admin user used (admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!) is a super_admin so the Users tab is visible. All modular tab components (CustomersTab, OrdersTab, SubscriptionsTab, PromoCodesTab, TermsTab, UsersTab, ArticlesTab) are working correctly. ArticlesTab self-fetches its customers list independently.
rca_of_issue: LogsTab runtime crash RCA: Radix UI's SelectItem component (from shadcn/ui) throws a runtime error when value='' (empty string) because Radix uses empty string internally to represent 'no selection / show placeholder'. Having a SelectItem with value='' conflicts with this reserved value. The LogsTab had 4 SelectItem components with empty string values: Source ('All sources'), Entity Type ('All types'), Success ('All'), and Severity ('All'). Fix: Use a non-empty sentinel value ('__all__') for 'All/default' SelectItems and map it back to '' in the onValueChange handler. Pattern: value={filters.source || '__all__'} onValueChange={(v) => setF('source')(v === '__all__' ? '' : v)}
